name: code-guardian
description: [EXPERIMENTAL] Deterministic security scanning layer for Claude Code with AI-powered review. Auto-detects stack, runs open-source security CLI tools (SAST, secrets, dependencies, containers, IaC), then an AI reviewer catches business logic flaws, auth bypass, race conditions, and other issues scanners miss. Auto-fixes issues and recommends CI additions. Supports interactive and yolo modes. Check https://github.com/stefanoginella/claude-code-plugins/blob/main/plugins/code-guardian/README.md for details.
